TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Carlos_Boozer, title = Carlos_Boozer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Carlos_Boozer} }

S.FORM: Carlos Boozer siwkay niza nalecuhan i Aschaffenburg, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Carlos Boozer i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Cleveland Cavaliers putiput. tatama, lumeniay a banges, u West Germany kanatal a tademaw. nalecuhan i 11 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1981 a mihca, Carlos Boozer, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶arr~…æos booz…ôr siwkaj niza nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i as ¶ƒßaff…ônburg, w…ôst g…ôrmanj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶arr~…æos booz…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶r~…æ…ô*…ôr~…æand ¶a*ar~…æi…ôrs putiput. tatama, r~…æum…ôniaj a ba≈ã…ôs, u w…ôst g…ôrmanj kanatar~…æ a tad…ômaw. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶arr~…æos booz…ôr, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Carlos Boozer siwkay niza nalecuhan i Aschaffenburg, West Germany, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Carlos Boozer i 2002 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Cleveland Cavaliers putiput. tatama, lumeniay a banges, u West Germany kanatal a tademaw. nalecuhan i 11 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1981 a mihca, Carlos Boozer, miunduay.
